data.name: Auth.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: Auth.UserNotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: Auth.AccountInactive
data.value: Your account is inactive. Please contact HR.

data.name: Auth.CompanyInactive
data.value: Your company's account is currently inactive. Please contact support.

data.name: Auth.TokenNotFound
data.value: Authentication token was not found.

data.name: Auth.TokenExpired
data.value: Authentication token has expired.

data.name: Auth.Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: Auth.EmployeeBlockedStatus
data.value: Your account is not active. Please contact HR.

data.name: Auth.InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: The refresh token is invalid.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: The refresh token has expired.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenRevoked
data.value: Suspicious activity detected: Refresh token reuse. All sessions revoked.

data.name: Auth.ResetFailed
data.value: Failed to reset password.

data.name: Auth.PasswordChangeFailed
data.value: Failed to change password.

data.name: Auth.ForcedChangeNotRequired
data.value: User is not required to change their password via this endpoint.

data.name: Auth.InvalidOtp
data.value: Invalid OTP code provided.

data.name: Auth.Forbidden
data.value: You are not authorized to access this resource.

data.name: User.NotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: User.AlreadyExists
data.value: User with this email already exists.

data.name: User.UpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update user.

data.name: User.DeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete user.

data.name: User.InvalidOtp
data.value: Invalid OTP code provided.

data.name: User.OtpMaxAttemptsReached
data.value: Maximum OTP attempts reached. Please request a new code.

data.name: Employee.NotFound
data.value: Employee was not found.

data.name: Employee.AlreadyExists
data.value: An employee with this email or phone number already exists.

data.name: Employee.CreationFailed
data.value: Failed to create employee account. Please try again.

data.name: Employee.AlreadyInactive
data.value: Employee is already inactive.

data.name: Employee.InvalidEmploymentStatus
data.value: Employment status value is invalid.

data.name: Company.NotFound
data.value: Company was not found.

data.name: Department.NotFound
data.value: Department was not found.

data.name: Department.AlreadyExists
data.value: A department with this name already exists in the company.

data.name: Unit.NotFound
data.value: Unit was not found.

data.name: Unit.AlreadyExists
data.value: A unit with this name already exists in the department.

data.name: Team.NotFound
data.value: Team was not found.

data.name: Team.AlreadyExists
data.value: A team with this name already exists in the unit.

data.name: LeaveBalance.NotFound
data.value: No leave balance found for this employee and year.

data.name: LeaveBalance.AlreadyInitialized
data.value: Leave balance for this type and year already exists.

data.name: LeaveBalance.Insufficient
data.value: Insufficient leave balance for the requested duration.

data.name: LeaveBalance.InvalidDuration
data.value: Duration must be positive.

data.name: Request.NotFound
data.value: Request was not found.

data.name: Request.TypeDisabled
data.value: The requested type is not available for your company.

data.name: Request.NotPending
data.value: Only pending requests can be modified or deleted.

data.name: Request.ModificationLocked
data.value: Request is locked once approval process has started.

data.name: Request.DefinitionNotFound
data.value: Request configuration for this type was not found.

data.name: Request.DefinitionAlreadyExists
data.value: A request definition for this type already exists for this company.

data.name: Request.Unauthorized
data.value: You are not the designated approver for this request at this stage.

data.name: Request.Locked
data.value: Request is not in a state that can be approved or handled.

data.name: Request.InvalidDuration
data.value: Duration must be positive.

data.name: Request.NoActiveManagersAtStep
data.value: A workflow step has no active managers assigned.

data.name: Request.InvalidWorkflowChain
data.value: Workflow step references a node not in the approval chain.

data.name: Request.NotPendingApproval
data.value: This request is not currently awaiting approval.

data.name: Request.StepOrderExceeded
data.value: Step order exceeds the number of workflow steps.

data.name: Request.OrgNodeNotInCompany
data.value: The referenced org node does not belong to this company.

data.name: Request.DirectEmployeeNotInCompany
data.value: The referenced employee does not belong to this company.

data.name: Request.DirectEmployeeNotActive
data.value: The referenced employee is not active.

data.name: Request.MissingDirectEmployeeId
data.value: A DirectEmployee step must specify a DirectEmployeeId.

data.name: Request.MissingOrgNodeId
data.value: An OrgNode step must specify an OrgNodeId.

data.name: Request.MissingCompanyRoleId
data.value: A CompanyRole step must specify a CompanyRoleId.

data.name: Request.RoleNotInCompany
data.value: The referenced company role does not belong to this company.

data.name: Request.RoleNotFound
data.value: The referenced company role was not found.

data.name: Request.MissingLevelsUp
data.value: A HierarchyLevel step must specify LevelsUp greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: Request.InvalidStartFromLevel
data.value: StartFromLevel must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: Request.UnexpectedFieldsOnHierarchyLevelStep
data.value: HierarchyLevel steps must not have OrgNodeId, DirectEmployeeId, or BypassHierarchyCheck.

data.name: Request.HierarchyLevelFieldsOnNonHierarchyStep
data.value: StartFromLevel and LevelsUp are only valid on HierarchyLevel steps.

data.name: Request.HierarchyRangesOverlap
data.value: HierarchyLevel step ranges must not overlap.

data.name: Notification.NotFound
data.value: Notification was not found.

data.name: Notification.Forbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to access this notification.

data.name: Notification.SendFailed
data.value: Failed to send the notification.

data.name: Notification.TokenMissing
data.value: The target employee does not have a valid FCM token.

data.name: Attendance.NotFound
data.value: Attendance record was not found.

data.name: Attendance.AlreadyClockedIn
data.value: Employee already has an open attendance record.

data.name: Attendance.ClockInRequired
data.value: Employee must clock in before clocking out.

data.name: Attendance.AlreadyClockedOut
data.value: Employee has already clocked out.

data.name: Attendance.InvalidClockOut
data.value: Clock-out time must be after clock-in time.

data.name: Attendance.InvalidClockIn
data.value: Clock-in time cannot be more than 5 minutes in the future.

data.name: Attendance.OverrideReasonRequired
data.value: Override reason is required.

data.name: Workflow.NotFound
data.value: No approval workflow defined for this request type.

data.name: Workflow.InvalidStep
data.value: The workflow step is no longer valid or has changed.

data.name: OrgNode.NotFound
data.value: The requested organization node was not found.

data.name: OrgNode.CircularReference
data.value: Cannot create a circular hierarchy reference.

data.name: OrgNode.DuplicateAssignment
data.value: This employee is already assigned to this node.

data.name: OrgNode.AssignmentNotFound
data.value: Assignment not found.

data.name: OrgNode.InvalidHierarchyConfiguration
data.value: Invalid hierarchy configuration detected.

data.name: Roles.NotFound
data.value: The role was not found.

data.name: Roles.NameAlreadyExists
data.value: A role with this name already exists in the company.

data.name: Roles.InUseByWorkflow
data.value: This role is referenced by an active workflow definition and cannot be deleted.

data.name: Roles.AlreadyAssigned
data.value: This role is already assigned to the employee.

data.name: Roles.AssignmentNotFound
data.value: This role assignment does not exist.

data.name: Roles.InvalidPermission
data.value: One or more permissions are not valid. Check AppPermissions for allowed values.

data.name: Hierarchy.NotConfigured
data.value: The company hierarchy has not been configured yet.

data.name: Hierarchy.InvalidRole
data.value: One or more roles are not valid for the company hierarchy. SuperAdmin is not allowed.

data.name: Hierarchy.DuplicateRole
data.value: Each role can only appear once in the hierarchy configuration.

data.name: Hierarchy.MultipleCeos
data.value: Only one CEO position can be configured per company.

data.name: Hierarchy.WorkflowRoleNotInHierarchy
data.value: One or more workflow step roles are not configured in the company hierarchy.

data.name: Hierarchy.InvalidStepOrder
data.value: Workflow steps must strictly escalate in authority order.

data.name: Hierarchy.RoleInUse
data.value: Cannot remove role because it is currently being used in one or more active Request Definitions.

data.name: Storage.BucketNotFound
data.value: The storage bucket was not found.

data.name: Storage.ObjectNotFound
data.value: The object was not found in storage.

data.name: Storage.UploadFailed
data.value: Failed to upload the file to storage.

data.name: Storage.DeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete the object from storage.

data.name: Storage.ListFailed
data.value: Failed to list objects in storage.

data.name: Storage.PresignedUrlFailed
data.value: Failed to generate a download URL.

data.name: ContactAdmin.NotFound
data.value: Contact admin request was not found.

data.name: ContactAdmin.AlreadyProcessed
data.value: This request has already been processed.

data.name: ContactAdmin.DuplicatePendingRequest
data.value: A pending request with this email or company name already exists.

data.name: ContactAdmin.PhoneNumberAlreadyTaken
data.value: This phone number is already taken.

data.name: ContactAdmin.EmailAlreadyTaken
data.value: This email is already taken.

data.name: ContactAdmin.CompanyNameAlreadyTaken
data.value: This company name is already taken.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.NotFound
data.value: Request not found.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.NotPending
data.value: Only pending requests can be handled.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.EmployeeNotFound
data.value: Employee not found. Data may be corrupted.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.EmptyChanges
data.value: ChangesJson is empty for approved request. Cannot apply changes.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.DeserializationFailed
data.value: Failed to deserialize ChangesJson for request.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.UnknownField
data.value: Unknown field in ChangesJson.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.HasPending
data.value: You already have a pending profile update request.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.InvalidField
data.value: Field is not allowed for update.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.NoChanges
data.value: No new or valid changes provided. The entered values map to your existing profile.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.MalformedChanges
data.value: One or more fields in the changes payload are missing the required 'newValue' key.

data.name: ProfileUpdate.InvalidLocationId
data.value: Invalid CompanyLocationId provided.

data.name: Hr.EmployeeNotFound
data.value: The acting user has no employee record.

data.name: General.ServerError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: General.ValidationError
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: General.NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: General.ArgumentError
data.value: An invalid argument was provided.

data.name: General.InvalidOperation
data.value: The requested operation is not valid in the current state.

data.name: General.Forbidden
data.value: You are not authorized to access this resource.

data.name: Validation.FieldRequired
data.value: A required field is missing.

data.name: Validation.InvalidType
data.value: Field has an invalid data type.

data.name: Validation.Error
data.value: An error occurred during validation.
